## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this? -->

- [ ] `./gradlew test` is green
- [ ] `./gradlew :sample:assembleDebug` builds
- [ ] Verified on a real API 33+ device/emulator (required for shader/visual changes)
- [ ] If I changed the shader, I updated its `GlassMath` Kotlin mirror to match
